steps.title: Expand and collect C terms
steps.content:
Distribute $N$ on the right side of $PC = N(52 - C)$ to get $PC = 52N - NC$.
Add $NC$ to both sides:
$$PC + NC = 52N$$

steps.title: Factor out C and solve
steps.content:
Factor $C$ from the left side:
$$C(P + N) = 52N$$
Divide both sides by $(P + N)$:
$$C = \frac{52N}{P + N}$$
That confirms C is correct.
